name: documents_v2
notes: The tags column is a PostgreSQL TEXT[] array. The PUT handler replaces the entire array atomically with a single UPDATE … SET tags = $1 WHERE id = $2.

The backend re-filters the submitted tags array (trims whitespace, removes non-strings, enforces max 10) before writing; the frontend enforces the same max-10 and no-duplicate rules client-side, so the backend filter is a defence-in-depth check.
